evals.name: full-run
evals.prompt: Generate this month's Frimley Flyers monthly report please
evals.expected_output: Two formatted .xlsx files (last-month-only-formatted.xlsx and last-month-all-formatted.xlsx) plus a social media summary in the conversation

evals.name: summary-only
evals.prompt: Give me the social media summary for this month's parkrun league results
evals.expected_output: A social media summary covering top 5 performers, milestones, other point-scorers, and season standings
